advert.description: The first advert segment features fridge shelves displaying yoghurt containers. Based on the duration of 20s and sequence, this corresponds to the initial advertisement.
The second segment shows packaged hot cross buns with the M&S Food logo. This matches the ~30s duration of the second ad in the sequence.

advert.brand: Merlin annual pass by Merlin entertainment
advert.description: The third segment displays an NHS sign promoting a blood pressure check. This aligns with the ~30s duration of the third advertisement.
This timestamp marks the beginning of the transition to the "This Morning" show promo, corresponding to the fourth advertised slot in the sequence.
